Container.Name: pokecollector-backend
Container.Overview: PokéCollector Backend — FastAPI service providing the REST API for the Pokemon TCG collection manager.
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL 15 must be running and accessible. Custom Docker network required: docker network create pokecollector

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Port for the FastAPI backend (also used by the frontend nginx proxy).

Config.Name: Backups
Config.Description: Directory for database backups created by the app.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Replace 'changeme' with your POSTGRES_PASSWORD. The hostname must match the container name of the postgres container.

Config.Name: ADMIN_USERNAME
Config.Description: Username for the initial admin account.

Config.Name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Password for the initial admin account.

Config.Name: JWT_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens. Use a long random string (e.g. output of: openssl rand -hex 32).

Config.Name: CORS_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Allowed CORS origins, comma-separated (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:3000). Leave empty to allow all.

Config.Name: TCGDEX_SYNC_LANGUAGES
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of languages to sync from TCGdex (e.g. en,de,fr).

Config.Name: GEMINI_API_KEY
Config.Description: Google Gemini API key for AI card recognition (optional).
